remarks: **REDUCED** Why rent when you can own? Excellent opportunity to own a bright and spacious 5th-floor studio apartment in the heart of downtown Stamford. Enjoy convenient access to everything the city has to offer - restaurants, shopping, entertainment, parks, public transportation, and the train station, all just minutes away. Commuters will appreciate approximately 45-mt train access to Manhattan & easy connections throughout the region.This inviting studio offers abundant natural light, well-equipped kitchen, full bath, elevator access, reserved parking, & additional visitor parking spaces - making everyday living comfortable and convenient.  Downtown Stamford offers an exciting and energetic lifestyle with a wonderful mix of fine dining, casual cafes, international cuisines, breweries, and vibrant nightlife. Residents enjoy popular entertainment venues including live theater, concerts, seasonal festivals, and waterfront events. Nearby parks and recreation areas provide beautiful walking paths, green spaces, tennis courts, and outdoor activities, while Stamford's scenic beaches and harbor areas are just a short drive away for boating, kayaking, and summer relaxation.  The area is also known for its excellent fitness studios, yoga centers, skating rinks, golf courses, and cultural attractions. From upscale dining and boutique shopping to cozy coffee shops and lively downtown events, Stamford offers the perfect balance of city energy and coastal New England charm. W
